examples: he painted all day in the garden
He painted a painting of the garden

meanings.definition: apply paint to; coat with paint

examples: He painted his mistress many times

meanings.definition: apply a liquid to; e.g., paint the gutters with linseed oil
lacking substance or vitality as if produced by painting
examples: in public he wore a painted smile

meanings.definition: having sections or patches colored differently and usually brightly
